title: EasyJet reaches 'agreement in principle' over potential takeover
summary: EasyJet has reached an agreement in principle on a potential takeover following previous rejections of offers from US investment firm Castlelake. The development marks a significant pivot in the airline's acquisition strategy and could reshape the competitive dynamics of European budget aviation.
content: The low-cost airline had previously rejected four takeover offers from US investment firm Castlelake.

zh.title: 易捷航空在潜在收购上达成"原则性协议"
zh.summary: 易捷航空在之前拒绝了美国投资公司Castlelake的多个收购报价后，就潜在收购达成了原则性协议。这一进展标志着该航空公司收购战略的重大转变，可能会改变欧洲廉价航空的竞争格局。

title: World Cup fans spent anywhere from $2,500 to $150,000 to see matches—they say it was worth it
summary: World Cup fans attending MetLife Stadium matches reported spending between $2,500 and $150,000, with attendees calling the investment worthwhile for the global sporting spectacle. The wide range reflects varying costs for tickets, travel, and accommodations across different World Cup experiences.
content: Soccer fans heading to World Cup matches at MetLife Stadium shared how much they expected to spend with CNBC Make It outside New York's Penn Station.

zh.title: 世界杯球迷花费2,500美元到150,000美元观看比赛——他们表示物有所值
zh.summary: 参加MetLife体育场世界杯比赛的球迷报告支出在2,500美元至150,000美元之间，参加者称这项投资对全球体育盛事是值得的。这一广泛的范围反映了不同世界杯体验中门票、旅行和住宿成本的差异。

title: Here are the 3 big things we're watching in the stock market this week
summary: Delta Airlines' earnings report represents the week's most closely watched corporate disclosure, with potential implications for the broader stock market. The airline's quarterly results could signal economic health and consumer spending patterns, particularly within the travel and transportation sectors.
content: Delta is the biggest earnings report of the week.

zh.title: 以下是我们本周在股市中关注的3件大事
zh.summary: 达美航空的财报是本周最受关注的企业披露，对更广泛的股市有潜在影响。该航空公司的季度业绩可能会反映经济健康状况和消费者支出模式，特别是在旅游和运输部门。

title: Brides are bringing back the one-night-only bachelorette party: 'You just come, have one perfect night and leave'
summary: A growing number of brides are reviving the one-night bachelorette party format, moving away from expansive multi-day destination trips. The trend reflects shifting preferences toward more intimate, manageable celebrations while reducing costs and logistical demands on wedding parties.
content: Before they ballooned into multi-day destination getaways, bachelorette parties tended to be one night of raucous fun. Some brides are bringing it back.

zh.title: 新娘们重新流行一夜单身派对：'你只需来，共度一个完美的夜晚，然后离开'
zh.summary: 越来越多的新娘重新采用一夜单身派对的形式，远离大规模的多日目的地旅行。这一趋势反映了人们对更亲密、易于管理的庆祝方式的偏好转变，同时降低了成本和对伴娘团的后勤需求。

title: Trump Accounts for kids launched July 4: What parents need to know
summary: Trump Accounts, a new financial program for children, launched July 4 with eligibility requirements and withdrawal provisions. The accounts aim to provide younger Americans with early financial access.
content: Here's a breakdown of how Trump Accounts work, who qualifies for free money and when the funds can be withdrawn.

zh.title: 特朗普儿童账户于7月4日推出：家长需要了解的信息
zh.summary: 特朗普账户是一项新的儿童理财计划，于7月4日推出，具有资格要求和提取规定。该账户旨在为年轻美国人提供早期的财务获取途径。

title: Hybrids are the breakout star of the U.S. car market as EV demand fades
summary: Hybrid vehicles have emerged as the dominant choice in the U.S. car market as consumers prioritize affordability and efficiency over electric vehicles. This marks a shift in automotive purchasing preferences.
content: Hybrids aren’t a bridge to EVs anymore — instead, they’re winning on function and price.

zh.title: 随着电动车需求下降，混合动力车成为美国汽车市场的大赢家
zh.summary: 混合动力汽车已成为美国汽车市场的主要选择，因为消费者优先考虑价格和效率而不是电动汽车。这标志着汽车购买偏好的转变。

title: Macquarie says now is the 'best time' to buy Chinese AI chip stocks. This one's its favorite
summary: Macquarie Bank initiated research coverage on five Chinese semiconductor companies and identified them as attractive investments in artificial intelligence chip production. The recommendation reflects optimism on China's AI hardware sector.
content: Macquarie began research coverage of five Chinese companies making chips for artificial intelligence applications.

zh.title: 麦格理表示现在是购买中国人工智能芯片股票的"最佳时机"，这是他们最看好的一只
zh.summary: 麦格理银行对五家中国半导体公司启动了研究覆盖，并将其认定为人工智能芯片生产领域的有吸引力投资。该建议反映了对中国人工智能硬件产业的乐观态度。

title: Why the stock market’s red-hot momentum trade might be headed for a violent unwind this month
summary: Market strategists warn that momentum trades face heightened risk of a sharp reversal in July, citing historical patterns and current market volatility. The volatility could intensify this year.
content: Momentum trades tend to struggle in July — but this year may be particularly volatile, says one strategist. The rumblings have already started.

zh.title: 股票市场火热的动量交易本月可能面临剧烈回调的原因
zh.summary: 市场策略师警告，动量交易面临7月份急剧反转的风险增加，理由是历史模式和当前市场波动性。波动性可能在今年进一步加剧。

title: Cargo vessel in Red Sea reports coming under attack, UK maritime body says
summary: A cargo vessel reported coming under attack in the Red Sea, a critical global shipping corridor, amid a fragile ceasefire between Iran and the United States. The incident highlights ongoing tensions in the region.
content: The incident was reported in one of the world's most crucial trade transit routes amid a fragile ceasefire between Iran and the U.S.

zh.title: 英国海事机构称红海货轮遭遇袭击
zh.summary: 一艘货轮报告在全球关键航运通道红海遭到袭击，伊朗与美国之间的脆弱停火协议中发生此事。该事件凸显了该地区持续存在的紧张局势。

title: ‘We were stunned’: My daughter, 39, said her mother-in-law gives her more money than we do. Should I confront her?
summary: An advice columnist addresses family tensions over disparate financial gifts, with a grandmother-in-law providing substantially more money to a grandchild than her own parents. The situation raises questions about family expectations.
content: “She thanked us for the $100 birthday gift and then announced that her mother-in-law had sent her $400.”

zh.title: "我们被震撼了"：我39岁的女儿说婆婆给她的钱比我们多，我应该与她当面对质吗？
zh.summary: 一位建议专栏作家讨论了因不均等的经济赠予引起的家庭紧张关系，其中一位婆婆给孙女的钱远多于女儿自己的父母所给。这种情况引发了对家庭期望的质疑。

title: Goldman Sachs says these undervalued stocks are 'well positioned' to outperform
summary: Goldman Sachs identified a group of undervalued stocks positioned to deliver outperformance in the third quarter. The recommendation targets securities expected to benefit from third-quarter market trends.
content: The firm highlighted stocks that are poised for gains as the third quarter unfolds.

zh.title: 高盛称这些被低估的股票"定位良好"将跑赢大盘
zh.summary: 高盛确认了一组被低估的股票有望在第三季度实现超额回报。该建议针对预期受益于第三季度市场趋势的证券。

title: Top Wall Street analysts prefer these dividend stocks for boosting portfolio returns
summary: Top Wall Street analysts recommend dividend-paying stocks as a strategy for boosting portfolio returns amid thousands of dividend-yielding options. The picks target investors seeking income-generating investments.
content: With thousands of dividend-paying companies to choose from, identifying the right stocks can be challenging.

zh.title: 华尔街顶级分析师推荐这些分红股票以提升投资组合回报
zh.summary: 华尔街顶级分析师建议采用分红股票策略来提升投资组合回报，在众多分红股票中进行选择。这些选择针对寻求产生收入的投资者。

title: Bank of America’s third-quarter top picks include this streaming stock with 40% upside
summary: Bank of America named Visa, Walmart, and Spotify among its top third-quarter stock picks, with Spotify offering an estimated 40% upside potential. The selections target growth opportunities in the coming quarter.
content: The firm's top picks for the third quarter include Visa, Walmart and Spotify.

zh.title: 美国银行第三季度的顶级选择包括这只流媒体股票，涨幅潜力达40%
zh.summary: 美国银行将Visa、沃尔玛和Spotify列为第三季度的顶级股票选择，其中Spotify的估计涨幅潜力为40%。这些选择针对未来一个季度的增长机会。

title: OPEC+ approves further oil output increase as Hormuz exports start to recover
summary: OPEC+ approved additional oil production increases, bringing total quota hikes to nearly 800,000 barrels per day from April through July, as exports through the Strait of Hormuz recover. The action reflects stabilizing supply conditions.
content: OPEC+, ‌which groups OPEC and allied producers including Russia, has hiked their output quotas ⁠from April through July by almost 800,000 bpd.

zh.title: OPEC+批准进一步增加石油产量，荷尔木兹海峡出口开始恢复
zh.summary: OPEC+批准了额外的石油产量增加，将4月至7月的总配额增幅提高到近80万桶/天，因为通过荷尔木兹海峡的出口在恢复。这一举动反映了供应条件的稳定。

title: Three sons of Iran's slain leader Khamenei appear at funeral, not his successor
summary: Three sons of Iran's deceased leader appeared at funeral ceremonies while the designated successor was notably absent, raising questions about succession stability. The absence marks a significant development in Iranian political continuity.
content: Iranian state TV showed Khamenei's sons Mostafa, Meysam and Masoud praying at the funeral. Supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei was not seen.

zh.title: 伊朗已故领导人哈梅内伊的三个儿子出现在葬礼上，但继任者缺席
zh.summary: 伊朗已故领导人的三个儿子出现在葬礼仪式上，而指定的继任者明显缺席，引起了对继任稳定性的质疑。这一缺席标志着伊朗政治连续性的一个重大发展。

title: Trump gives campaign-style July 4 speech on National Mall for U.S. 250th anniversary
summary: Trump delivered a campaign-style speech at the National Mall during the U.S. 250th anniversary celebration on July 4th, blending patriotic messaging with criticism of perceived ideological threats at home and abroad. The address highlighted his characteristic political rhetoric during the Independence Day commemoration. The speech exemplified ongoing campaign messaging during a national anniversary event.
content: Trump's speech mixed patriotism with attacks on perceived ideological threats at home and abroad.

zh.title: 特朗普在国家广场发表竞选风格的7月4日演讲，纪念美国建国250周年
zh.summary: 特朗普在美国建国250周年庆祝活动期间在国家广场发表竞选风格演讲，将爱国信息与对国内外意识形态威胁的批评相结合。该演讲在独立日纪念活动中凸显了他特有的政治修辞风格。这次演讲体现了在国家纪念活动期间持续进行的竞选宣传。

title: Clay, kilns and the cost of survival for tile makers
summary: European tile manufacturers face mounting economic pressures forcing choices between preserving traditional craft practices and investing in modernization. The industry reflects broader tensions between heritage and economic viability.
content: While some firms lean into their heritage, others are modernising in the face of economic pressures.

zh.title: 粘土、窑炉和瓷砖制造商的生存代价
zh.summary: 欧洲瓷砖制造商面临日益增加的经济压力，被迫在保留传统工艺和投资现代化之间做出选择。该行业反映了传统与经济可行性之间的更广泛的张力。
